solo.description: Minimal agent — only read, grep, glob.
solo.welcomeMessage: I see. I hear. I find.

basic.description: Simple agent — full read access, no write permissions.
basic.welcomeMessage: Give me the files and I will look at them.

builder.description: Build agent — can modify files but needs permission.
builder.welcomeMessage: I can build, but first you must trust me.

web.description: Web agent — searches, reads docs, fetches knowledge.
web.welcomeMessage: I went to the web-lands. Here is what I found.

admin.description: Admin agent — full write, shell, and can delegate to other agents.
admin.welcomeMessage: Open sesame. I have the keys and the authority.

mega.description: Overpowered agent — nearly everything allowed, maximum access.
mega.welcomeMessage: I am the mightiest goblin. All paths are open to me.
